steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Predict Versioned Name Invalidation · Theory Versioned Name Invalidation
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go file-delivery team handles case 4028 during a cost-anomaly investigation. Build deterministic Go evidence to align cache identity, origin forwarding, TTL, versioned names, and urgent invalidation; do not treat an ETag, CORS result, emulator, or successful SDK call as stronger proof than it is; then change the object version and prove stale authority is rejected. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
